headerDisplay: Homebridge Proxy which exposes a Loxone System to Homekit
footerDisplay: For setup information, bug reports and feature requests please visit the [Plugin Homepage](https://github.com/rudyberends/homebridge-loxone-proxy).

MotionTriggersDoorbell.title: Use Motion to trigger Doorbell event

JpegHeaderSize.title: JPEG Header Size Offset (bytes)
JpegHeaderSize.description: Adjust motion detection baseline when cameras prepend variable JPEG metadata.

EnableTwoWayAudio.title: Enable Two-Way Audio (experimental)
EnableTwoWayAudio.description: Enables HomeKit return audio. Loxone Intercom V2 uses automatic WebRTC talkback (no FFmpeg output args needed).

TwoWayAudioOutputArgs.title: Two-Way Audio FFmpeg Output Args
TwoWayAudioOutputArgs.description: Optional for non-Loxone cameras: FFmpeg output arguments for return audio. Placeholders: {camera_host}, {stream_url}, {audio_host}, {audio_user}, {audio_pass}. Example: -ac 1 -ar 8000 -acodec pcm_mulaw -f rtp rtp://{camera_host}:5004

Outlet.title: Outlet (Will map all SwitchItems starting with this alias to a HomeKit Outlet)

Lock.title: Lock (Will map all SwitchItems starting with this alias to a HomeKit DoorLock)

ReverseLockSwitch.title: Reverse the Switch order (Switch ON equals door Unlocked)

Motion.title: Motion (Will map all items starting with this alias to a HomeKit MotionSensor)

Smoke.title: Smoke (Will map all items starting with this alias to a HomeKit SmokeSensor)

Leak.title: Leak (Will map all items starting with this alias to a HomeKit LeakSensor)

Brightness.title: Brightness (Will map all items starting with this alias to a HomeKit LightSensor)

Humidity.title: Humidity (Will map all items starting with this alias to a HomeKit HumiditySensor)

Temperature.title: Temperature (Will map all items starting with this alias to a HomeKit TemperatureSensor)

layout.title: Filters
layout.description: Select what to expose to HomeKit.

layout.title: SwitchItem Mappings
layout.description: Map Switch items using an Alias

layout.title: InfoOnlyAnalog Mappings
layout.description: Map InfoOnlyAnalog items using an Alias

layout.title: InfoOnlyDigital Mappings
layout.description: Map InfoOnlyDigital items using an Alias

layout.title: HomeKit Secure Video (HKSV)
layout.description: Enable or disable HKSV recording features. Requires iCloud+ and a compatible HomeKit Hub.
